steps.title: Spot the specific contrast
steps.content: The notes show that Live On, Heart of My Nation features a Choctaw hymn while Cacéga Ayuwipi incorporates a Haida gourd rattle. To emphasize this difference between the two compositions, an answer must explicitly state what makes each one distinct.

steps.title: Apply the contrast to the choices
steps.content: Choice A does exactly this: it specifies that Live On, Heart of My Nation features a Choctaw hymn and that Cacéga Ayuwipi incorporates a Haida gourd rattle. The other choices either omit these specific details (B), list hymns and instruments as interchangeable examples without attributing them to particular pieces (C), or reference “different approaches” without describing them (D). This matches choice A — A is correct.
